publishedAbstract: - Trying to create a PVC using a custom StorageClass folowing the [documentation](https://docs.openshift.com/container-platform/4.5/storage/persistent_storage/persistent-storage-azure.html) fails. StorageClass is using `kubernetes.io/azure-disk` and `kind:dedicated`. Create a new PVC using the above StorageClass give an error similar to the following: ~~~ Error creating provisioned PV object for claim default/azurediskdedicated: persistentvolumes "pvc-70139e6a-8e46-4ad4-b6d8-dc3d4a79fb07" is forbidden: error querying AzureDisk volume name-6m4ms-dynamic-pvc-70139e6a-8e46-4ad4-b6d8-dc3d4a79fb07: invalid disk URI: https://clusterae1a8.blob.core.windows.net/vhds/npaez-6m4ms-dynamic-pvc-70139e6a-8e46-4ad4-b6d8-dc3d4a79fb07.vhd. Deleting the volume. ~~~
publishedTitle: Error creating PVC using a StorageAccount kind dedicated with Azure Disk
